prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to scotland and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: The document specifically provides guidance and support for families bereaved by murder or manslaughter abroad, focusing on services available in England and Wales. It references a separate section for Scotland, indicating that the provisions outlined do not apply to that nation.
